title: b9387
description: CUDA: route batch>=4 quantized matmul to MMQ on AMD MFMA hardware ( #23227 ) CUDA: per-quant MMVQ/MMQ batch threshold on AMD MFMA hardware The dispatcher uses a single global threshold (MMVQ_MAX_BATCH_SIZE = 8) to choose between mul_mat_vec_q (per-row GEMV) and mul_mat_q (MFMA-tiled GEMM) for quantized matmul.
